name: Hub
description: This is the hub where all of the platform's templates may be browsed.

metadata.name: Example Cancer Classifier Training With MLFLow (Python Job)
metadata.description: Train a cancer classifier ML model using MLFlow framework to structure and represent the model data. The trained model then can be deployed with the MLFlowServe framework or used for batch classifications loading it using the MLFlow framework. Digital health workers can leverage this service to enhance their document processing workflows, ensuring accurate and timely classification of official documents.

metadata.name: Document Classifier Training With Bert Model (Python Job)
metadata.description: Document classifier relying on LLM implementations for different languages. This example uses Italian language BERT model (dbmdz/bert-base-italian-xxl-cased) for document classification. Built using HuggingFace transformers library.

metadata.name: Download Sentinel Data (Container Job)
metadata.description: Function for Sentinel image download and preprocessing. Geo-spatial data is often large and complex, making it challenging to manage and process. This function addresses these challenges by providing a streamlined solution for downloading and preprocessing Sentinel satellite imagery. It enables users to efficiently acquire high-quality geospatial data, which can be used for various applications such as environmental monitoring, land use analysis, and disaster management. By automating the download and preprocessing steps, this function helps users save time and resources while ensuring they have access to the necessary data for their geospatial projects.

metadata.name: Example Echo Service (Python Serve)
metadata.description: A simple python-based API responding to a POST message with the "text" field. The function exposes an API using "serve" task.

metadata.name: Flood Mapping Analysis (Container Job)
metadata.description: Function to elaborate  Sentinel-2 imagery data for flood mapping analysis. Geo-spatial data is often large and complex, making it challenging to manage and process. This function addresses these challenges by providing a streamlined solution for elaborating Sentinel-2 satellite imagery data for flood mapping analysis. It enables users to efficiently acquire high-quality geospatial data, which can be used for various applications such as environmental monitoring, land use analysis, and disaster management. By automating the elaboration steps, this function helps users save time and resources while ensuring they have access to the necessary data for their geospatial projects.

metadata.name: Deforestation Analysis (Container Job)
metadata.description: Function to elaborate Sentinel-2 imagery data for deforestation analysis. Geo-spatial data is often large and complex, making it challenging to manage and process. This function addresses these challenges by providing a streamlined solution for elaborating Sentinel-2 satellite imagery data for deforestation analysis. It enables users to efficiently acquire high-quality geospatial data, which can be used for various applications such as environmental monitoring, land use analysis, and disaster management. By automating the elaboration steps, this function helps users save time and resources while ensuring they have access to the necessary data for their geospatial projects.

metadata.name: Landslide Monitoring (Container Job)
metadata.description: Function to elaborate Sentinel-1 imagery data for landslide monitoring. Geological data is often large and complex, making it challenging to manage and process. This function addresses these challenges by providing a streamlined solution for elaborating Sentinel-1 satellite imagery data for landslide monitoring. It enables users to efficiently acquire high-quality geospatial data, which can be used for various applications such as environmental monitoring, land use analysis, and disaster management. By automating the elaboration steps, this function helps users save time and resources while ensuring they have access to the necessary data for their geospatial projects.

metadata.name: Example Container Job (Python Job)
metadata.description: A simple example function demonstrating how to create a Python job that can be run in a containerized environment using predefined base images. This function serves as a template for building custom container jobs within the platform.

metadata.name: Example Container Serve (Python Serve)
metadata.description: A simple example function demonstrating how to create a Python job that can be run in a containerized environment using predefined base images. This function serves as a template for serving containerized functions within the platform.

metadata.name: Example DBT Transform (DBT Job)
metadata.description: This function demonstrates how to create a DBT transformation job. It performs a simple SQL query on a sample dataitem named 'employees'. It further processes the data to extract all records and filters them based on a specific department ID. The resulting dataset is logged for verification. This example serves as a foundational template for building more complex DBT transformations within your data workflows.

metadata.name: Example ETL (Python Job)
metadata.description: A simple extract transform load (ETL) procedure in Python that downloads a csv file and then returns the result as a dataframe that is stored in the project repository as table(data-item).

metadata.name: Example Hello World (Python Job)
metadata.description: Hello world with python: write a string to stdout

metadata.name: Example Validate Table (Python Job)
metadata.description: A simple example function that downloads a CSV file from a given URL, validate its content, and loads the report into a specified output table.

metadata.name: LLM Ollama Serve (Kubeai-Text Serve)
metadata.description: This function demonstrates how to deploy and interact with the Llama 3.2 model using Ollama inside the DigitalHub platform.

metadata.name: LLM VLLM Serve (Kubeai-Text Serve)
metadata.description: This function demonstrates how to deploy and interact with the VLLM model using the KubeAI Text Serving framework inside the DigitalHub platform.

metadata.name: LLM VLLM Serve (vllmserve-text)
metadata.description: This function demonstrates how to deploy and interact with the VLLM model using the openAI Text Serving framework inside the DigitalHub platform.

metadata.name: Cancer Classifier Service (Project)
metadata.description: This project demonstrates how to train and deploy a cancer classification service based on the BERT model. The model is deployed as a service to assist with automated annotation and classification of official documents. It exposes an API using the "serve" task.

functions.description: Cancer Classifier Sklearn Serve With MLFlow. The model is deployed as a service to assist with automated annotation and classification of official documents. It exposes an API using the "serve" task. Digital workers can utilize this API to classify documents based on their content, enabling efficient document management and retrieval. The model is trained on a dataset of official documents and can classify them into predefined categories, improving the organization and accessibility of information. "Digital health workers can leverage this service to enhance their document processing workflows, ensuring accurate and timely classification of official documents.
functions.name: cancer-classifier-service

metadata.name: Document Classifier Service (Project)
metadata.description: This project demonstrates how to train and deploy a document classification service based on the BERT model. The model is deployed as a service to assist with automated annotation and classification of official documents. It exposes an API using the "serve" task.

metadata.name: Flower Orchestrator (Project)
metadata.description: This project demonstrates how to orchestrate flower-based workflows. Flower Federated Learning framework allows for running federated learning tasks where different client nodes perform local training and cooperatively create a more robust solution without exchanging the data but only the weight necessary to progress the training process.

metadata.name: Flower Client (flower-client)
metadata.description: This function demonstrates the Supernode client function to interact with the Flower server, how to build the corresponding image, and activates client nodes container with the dependencies and the node-specific configuration.

metadata.name: Flower Server (flower-server)
metadata.description: This function serves as a demonstration of the Flower Supernode server functionality. It builds the corresponding Docker image, and activate server node containers with the necessary dependencies and specific configurations tailored for each node.

metadata.name: Flower App (flower-app)
metadata.description: This function implements a Flower client application that connects to a Flower server, fetches data partitions, and sends results back to the server. It includes a sample implementation of the client-side logic for handling data partitions and communicating with the server.

metadata.name: RAG Text Service (Project)
metadata.description: This project demonstrates how to deploy a RAG text serving function using a Python function within the DigitalHub platform, which interacts with a VLLMServe text serving function and an embedding function to provide retrieval-augmented generation capabilities.

metadata.name: LLM VLLM Serve (vllmserve-text)
metadata.description: This function demonstrates how to deploy and interact with the VLLM model using the openAI Text Serving framework inside the DigitalHub platform.

metadata.name: Text Extraction Service (Project)
metadata.description: This project demonstrates how to deploy a text extraction service using Apache Tika in a container and a Python function to interact with it, all orchestrated within the DigitalHub platform.
